Home › Volusia County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Volusia County

The following 31 restaurants in Volusia County received a health grade of D or F at their most recent inspection, according to Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) public inspection records. Each listing shows its grade, score, and violation counts, ordered from the lowest score.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • B F 37
    BACI PIZZERIA & RISTORANTE

    Italian 4.5★ (1425)

    New Smyrna Beach · Volusia County

    VegHealthy

    Violations: 6 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 3 basic

  • B F 42
    BLUE SPRING PIZZA

    Italian 4.2★ (1438)

    Orange City · Volusia County

    VegGF

    Violations: 6 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 4 basic
